body.prompt: Create a clean educational study-note illustration for school students. Subject: Science. Grade level: Class IX. Session: Tissues - Session 2. Concept: Plant Tissues: The Growing and Mature Teams. Visual requirement: A diagram showing the root tip with a small cap at the very end (meristem) and longer, specialized cells further up. Style: textbook-friendly, diagram-like, clear, accurate, uncluttered, white or light background, student-safe, no watermark. If labels are needed, keep them minimal and readable.
